items.title: True Detective Poster
items.note: For the wall you stare at when it all connects.
items.alt_text: True Detective poster featuring characters in a grayscale scene with the “TRUE DETECTIVE” title.
items.description: Black and white metal poster print featuring two detectives in a moody, high-contrast composition with the large uppercase title “TRUE DETECTIVE” at the bottom. Designed for easy magnet mounting and a clean, modern look in matte or gloss finishes.

items.title: True Detective: The Complete Seasons 1-3 (box Set) [dvd]
items.note: For the wall you stare at when it all connects.
items.alt_text: Poster art featuring the silhouettes of main cast members for True Detective.
items.description: This is the complete DVD box set of the HBO original series "True Detective," encompassing seasons 1 through 3. The cover art features a stylized silhouette of a human head, with a dramatic, atmospheric scene of a road and trees double-exposed within it. The series stars prominent actors such as Matthew McConaughey, Woody Harrelson, Colin Farrell, Vince Vaughn, and Mahershala Ali.

items.title: True Detective: The Complete Third Season
items.note: The two of them, before the years got in.
items.alt_text: True Detective: Season 3 Blu-ray cover featuring Mahershala Ali.
items.description: This Blu-ray disc set features the complete third season of the acclaimed HBO original series "True Detective." Starring Academy Award winner Mahershala Ali, the season follows a retired detective haunted for 35 years by a disturbing case involving the disappearance of two children. The series explores themes of time, truth, and obsession.

items.title: True Detective: The Complete Seasons 1-3 (box Set) [blu-ray]
items.note: The two of them, before the years got in.
items.alt_text: Poster artwork featuring the title True Detective: The Complete Seasons 1-3.
items.description: Own the complete "True Detective" series with this Blu-ray box set, featuring all three seasons of the acclaimed HBO original series. This collection includes the gripping crime dramas starring Matthew McConaughey, Woody Harrelson, Colin Farrell, Vince Vaughn, and Mahershala Ali. Experience the intense storytelling and stellar performances in high definition.

items.title: True Detective Blu-ray
items.note: The two of them, before the years got in.
items.alt_text: Blu-ray disc case for True Detective featuring Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson
items.description: This is the Blu-ray release of the critically acclaimed drama series True Detective, featuring the first season starring Woody Harrelson and Matthew McConaughey as two detectives working on a grim 1995 murder case in Louisiana. The set includes 3 discs and contains all 8 episodes of the season.
key_features: Features English subtitles for the Hard of Hearing

items.title: Detective Hoodie
items.note: The two of them, before the years got in.

items.description: A black zip-up hoodie featuring embroidery, with the text True Detective and artwork on the chest, distressed or high-contrast graphics, and the numbers S1 and 14 on the sleeves. The design suggests a pop-culture-inspired or thematic apparel piece, possibly limited edition given the description and embroidery details.

items.title: The King In Yellow (paperback)
items.note: The 1895 book behind the dread. Public domain, private consequences.

items.description: A striking graphic novel adaptation of Robert W. Chambers's influential and unsettling weird fiction classic. This edition, illustrated by I.N.J. Culbard, visually captures the insidious horror of the forbidden play that drives its readers to madness, rendered in an expert, unsettling style.
key_features: Masterful adaptation of classic weird fiction

items.title: Personalized Zippo Windproof Lighter - Vintage Bar

items.description: This is a genuine Zippo windproof lighter featuring a classic brushed chrome finish and a vintage bar design theme. It is customizable with a choice of initial and two additional lines of personalized text. Known for its iconic 'click' sound and durable construction, this lighter is backed by Zippo's famous Lifetime Guarantee. Note that it ships without fuel for safety.

Carries the famous Zippo® Lifetime Guarantee
Does not contain any fuel when shipped

items.note: For statements. People say things.
items.alt_text: Silver PLAUD AI Note Voice Recorder device.
items.description: Capture your thoughts and conversations with the PLAUD AI Note Voice Recorder. This sleek, silver device features a brushed metal finish with vertical ribbing and a simple one-press recording button. It leverages advanced AI, including GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet, for transcription and summarization in 112 languages. With professional templates and a long-lasting battery, it's perfect for meetings, lectures, and interviews. The recorder comes with a 64GB storage capacity, offering 30 hours of continuous recording and 60 days of standby time.

It is designed for professional use with features like a directional microphone, LCD display, and function buttons for convenient operation. The device also supports SD and SDHC memory cards for expanded storage.

items.description: Elevate your home decor with this bundle of six genuine Natraj twisted branches. Ranging from 24 to 30 inches in height, these dried natural branches feature a unique, intricate twist and a refined varnished finish, highlighting the exotic architectural beauty of nature. Perfect for display alone in a tall statement vase for a minimalist centerpiece, or combine them with faux orchids to create a stunning, permanent botanical arrangement. The twigs are composed of real dried mulberry branches that will add a natural and elegant look to any place with these decorative and modern branches. You can also use these mulberry branches to make wreaths, floral crowns, vase decorations, room decorations, wedding decorations, etc. Please take into consideration: These are the branches only, the vase is not included in the purchase. You may pair these twigs with tall wispy grass, silk decorative flowers, and any style of floral arrangement, or you can display it into any vase for a full standout look. items.title: Custom Your Own 18k Gold Ouroboros Snake Ring V32
items.note: The snake eats its tail. Time does the same.
items.alt_text: Gold ouroboros ring with a detailed dragon head design.
items.description: This Ouroboros Ring is inspired by the ancient symbol of eternity and rebirth, depicted as a snake consuming its own tail. The ring features an intricately detailed snake body with a Gold Vermeil finish and a contrasting silver tail where the snake bites its body. The eyes of the snake are set with small, glittering Black Zircon gemstones. The inner wall is polished for comfort. This piece is handmade, hand-polished, and hand-oxidized, representing a unique blend of artistry and ancient symbolism.
key_features: Inspired by the ancient Ouroboros symbol
Design features a snake biting its own tail
18K Gold-plated Silver (Gold Vermeil snake body) and Silver (snake tail)

The ring is crafted from silver and features a customizable gemstone eye, with the current selection being Amethyst. It is designed for comfort with a smooth inner band.

items.title: The Infinite Door: A Tarot Deck And Guide Book
items.note: The ladies at the laundromat had opinions.
items.alt_text: The Infinite Door card game box with colorful illustrated cover showing a black hand and pink snake
items.description: Experience an immersive journey into intuition with The Infinite Door, a 78-card tarot deck created by multidisciplinary artist Pamela Love, featuring original full-color dreamscape artwork reimagining traditional iconography by artist Krys Maniecki. This deck serves as a fresh visual language for both novice and experienced tarot readers seeking deeper connection to archetypes and higher consciousness. This is a pre-order for the revised second edition, which will be signed by the creator and ship in mid-April.
key_features: Created by Pamela Love with art by Krys Maniecki
Pre-order for signed revised second edition

items.title: Egyptian Tarot Egyptian Tarot Deck (hardcover)
items.note: The ladies at the laundromat had opinions.
items.alt_text: Hardcover Egyptian Tarot deck featuring traditional Egyptian imagery and tarot cards.
items.description: Amazingly detailed and gracefully beautiful  Alasia s tempera-on-papyrus paintings meld the stunning style of ancient Egyptian art with the mysteries of the Tarot. To shape the interpretations  Alasia relied on the conceptions of Jean-Baptiste Pitois  who linked the Tarot tradition to the legendary Book of Thoth. Replete with ancient and exotic symbols  these cards speak to the soul. Includes booklet. The companion booklets for most Lo Scarabeo decks are in five languages: English  Spanish  French  Italian  and German.

It features realistic details, including visible cranial sutures and a movable jaw with teeth, making it suitable for medical teaching, Halloween decoration, or as a unique piece of gothic or macabre home decor. The finish mimics aged bone, providing a realistic appearance suitable for offices, bars, or classrooms. It is presented as a single decorative figurine.

Serves as a medical teaching sketch model

The 30"x40" (76x102 cm) vertical orientation is showcased with potential framing in silver or black frames. The artwork is handmade using professional oil/acrylic paints on high-quality linen canvas. It is made-to-order with a typical creation time of about 1 week, and shipping is generally 3-7 days via DHL/FEDEX. Free shipping is offered. Custom sizes and framing options are available on request. The piece emphasizes clean lines, subtle texture, and a contemporary aesthetic suited for hallways or living spaces.

items.title: Dark Roast Coffee - 2lb
items.note: New Orleans coffee, black. Sleep is a choice.
items.alt_text: Coffee Bros Dark Roast coffee bag with a black and white design
items.description: Experience the bold yet smooth flavor of our signature Dark Roast Coffee. Crafted from 100% premium Arabica beans sourced from Minas Gerais, Brazil, and Kayu Aro, Indonesia. This blend is roasted slightly lighter than a traditional dark roast (Agtron #55-61) to eliminate bitterness while highlighting rich flavor notes of dark chocolate, creamy caramel, and fresh maple syrup. It is naturally processed/wet-hulled, low in acidity, and third-party tested to be free from mold, pesticides, and mycotoxins. It is shipped as whole bean coffee and is suitable for super-automatic espresso machines as it avoids excessive surface oils.
key_features: Flavor notes: Dark Chocolate, Creamy Caramel, Fresh Maple Syrup

The composite toe provides protection, making them ideal for demanding work environments. Crafted from premium leather with contrasting stitching and a moc-toe design, these boots offer both rugged style and essential safety features. The oil- and slip-resisting rubber outsole ensures reliable traction, while the ankle-high profile and pull tabs provide a secure and easy fit.
key_features: ATS® technology provides ergonomic support on uneven terrain
FLX Foam™ midsole has a light springy feel that cushions each step
Lightweight sole made with SMARTLITE™ material from Huntsman
Oil- and slip-resisting blown rubber outsole

items.title: Original Michel Grisly Moc Toe Work Boots - Black
items.note: For ground that keeps secrets.
items.alt_text: Black leather work boot with black laces and a black sole
items.description: These Original Michel work boots feature a classic moc toe design, built for durability and comfort. They are constructed using Goodyear Welt construction and feature a genuine leather lining and a cushioned leather insole for all-day wear. The outsole is made from lightweight, oil-resistant polyurethane, providing reliable traction. These boots come in a versatile black color, with other options available.
key_features: Lightweight Polyurethane Oil Resistant Ultra Outsole

items.title: Danner Bull Run Moc Toe Mens Tobacco Leather 6in Usa Eh Work Boots
items.note: For ground that keeps secrets.
items.alt_text: Brown leather Danner Bull Run moc toe work boots with yellow and brown laces.
items.description: These are durable, 6-inch work boots from Danner, proudly manufactured in the USA. They feature a rich tobacco-colored full-grain oiled leather upper, contrasting white stitching on the moc toe, and distinctive yellow/brown laces threaded through brass eyelets. The boots are built with a wedge outsole that has a zig-zag pattern and a cream color, offering oil resistance and featuring a steel shank. They include an Ortholite footbed for comfort and meet ASTM F2892-11 EH safety standards. A small American flag patch is visible on the side near the ankle.

items.title: '47 Blank Trucker
items.note: Marty's off-duty thinking cap.
items.alt_text: White baseball cap with mesh back
items.description: This '47 Brand trucker hat features a mid-crown, curved visor, and adjustable plastic snapback for a comfortable fit. It is constructed from garment-washed cotton twill and mesh, ensuring durability and breathability.
key_features: Garment washed cotton twill and mesh

items.title: 5 Panel Mesh Trucker Snapback Cap - Navy
items.note: Marty's off-duty thinking cap.
items.alt_text: Navy blue baseball cap with mesh back
items.description: A classic 5-panel trucker style cap featuring breathable mesh back panels for superior ventilation. This high-profile cap has a structured front crown and a stiff, flat bill, making it ideal for outdoor activities like hiking or attending sporting events in any season. The material is a comfortable blend of cotton, polyester, and nylon, described as thick, soft, and light. It includes an adjustable plastic closure to ensure a good fit for most adults up to size XL.
key_features: Adjustable plastic snapback closure (fits up to XL)
Stiff, flat bill with matching under bill color
